summary.key_theme: 市場在通膨數據與地緣政治風險下呈現多空拉鋸，長期投資者仍視 VOO 為核心配置，但短期面臨技術性修正壓力。

bullish.title: VOO Is Down 7% From Its January High. The Case for Staying Put Has Never Been Stronger
bullish.reason: 強調市場回調是長期投資者的買入良機，重申 VOO 作為核心資產的價值。

bullish.title: S&P 500 is back above a key level, putting stock market bulls in control
bullish.reason: 指數重新站上 200 日移動平均線，釋放技術面轉強的正面訊號。

bullish.title: Here's Why Buying This Vanguard Index Fund Today Could Be the Best Financial Decision You Ever Make
bullish.reason: 強調 VOO 在投資組合多元化中的不可替代性，鼓勵長期持有。

bullish.title: How Nurses at Non-Profit Hospitals Can Stash $49,000 a Year Into ETFs Like VOO and VTI
bullish.reason: 透過具體案例展示 VOO 在退休儲蓄與稅務規劃中的實用性。

bullish.title: The 3 Names You Need To Know To Invest In This Market
bullish.reason: 儘管短期有疑慮，但長期看好 AI 驅動的生產力提升，對大盤持正面看法。

bearish.title: S&P 500: A Dead Money Era May Be Here, How To Thrive In It
bearish.reason: 指出滾動報酬率出現罕見的熊市警告，暗示未來可能進入長期停滯期。

bearish.title: S&P 500: Don't Buy The Dip When Macroeconomic Conditions Are Worsening
bearish.reason: 警告宏觀經濟惡化，認為目前的下跌並非買入訊號，預期 2026 年將有更深修正。

bearish.title: S&P 500: A Euphoric Market With A Sobering Ceasefire And GDP Reality
bearish.reason: 認為停火帶來的反彈過於樂觀，未充分反映高油價與通膨風險。

bearish.title: International ETFs Are Crushing VOO in 2026. Here Are 3 Worth Buying Now
bearish.reason: 指出 2026 年第一季國際市場表現優於 VOO，吸引資金配置轉移。

bearish.title: S&P 500: Markets Wait For Clarity On Iran, But It May Be Hard To Come By
bearish.reason: 伊朗危機未解與荷姆茲海峽封鎖，持續對市場情緒造成壓抑。

neutral.title: The S&P Hangs On The Edge As Today’s CPI Report Looms Over Open
neutral.reason: 市場在等待 CPI 數據公布前呈現觀望，期貨波動極小。

neutral.title: VTSAX vs VOO ETF: Which Vanguard Fund Should You Buy in 2026?
neutral.reason: 純粹的產品比較分析，旨在協助投資者選擇適合的 Vanguard 基金。

neutral.title: VOO vs. QQQ: Broad Market Exposure or Concentrated Mega-Cap Growth?
neutral.reason: 分析 VOO 與 QQQ 的策略差異，不涉及對 VOO 本身的看空或看多。

neutral.title: VOO vs. SPY — Which S&P 500 ETF Actually Wins for Long-Term Investors?
neutral.reason: 針對同類產品的費用與流動性比較，對股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: The Popular Vanguard S&P 500 ETF Costs $605 a Share. Vanguard Doesn't Think That's a Problem.
neutral.reason: 說明 Vanguard 對 ETF 拆股政策的立場，對基金基本面無影響。
